channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: USA Men's National Team Faces Turkey in Final World Cup Group Stage Match at SoFi Stadium
item.description: The United States Men's National Soccer Team (USMNT) is set to play its final Group D match of the 2026 World Cup against Turkey on Thursday at 10 p.m. ET. The match will take place at SoFi Stadium in...

item.title: D.C. Councilmember critiques sparse offerings at Great American State Fair in Washington, D.C.
item.description: A Washington, D.C. Councilmember, Christina Henderson, shared a candid and humorous look at the Great American State Fair held on the National Mall in Washington, D.C., highlighting what she described...

item.title: Delphia Therapeutics Appoints David Kerstein as Chief Medical Officer in Weekly Pharma Executive Moves
item.description: STAT's weekly 'Up and down the ladder' column highlights notable executive appointments and career moves across the pharmaceutical and biotechnology industries. In this edition, the featured announcem...

item.title: CNN analyzes Trump Truth Social post warning of dire consequences under Democrats
item.description: CNN anchors and reporters examined a recent social media post by President Donald Trump that sparked debate over its tone and rhetoric. According to the report, CNN White House correspondent Kristen H...

item.title: Brother of Trump’s Executive Assistant Natalie Harp Criticises Her Close Relationship with the President
item.description: The estranged brother of Natalie Harp, a senior executive assistant to US President Donald Trump, has publicly criticised her close working relationship with the president, describing it as “very unhe...

item.title: CNN analysis says rising health care costs could give Democrats a significant advantage in the 2026 midterm elections
item.description: A CNN data analysis presented by Harry Enten argues that health care costs have become the leading financial concern for Americans, potentially giving Democrats a significant political advantage ahead...

item.title: MSNBC panel questions Michael Boulos' presence at Rubio's Middle East meetings amid conflict-of-interest concerns
item.description: An MSNBC discussion focused on questions surrounding Michael Boulos, the husband of Tiffany Trump, after reports indicated that he attended meetings alongside Secretary of State Marco Rubio during a d...

item.title: New Genetic Study Finds Late Neanderthals Were Not Highly Inbred
item.description: A new study analyzing ancient DNA from 27 Neanderthal individuals suggests that the last surviving Neanderthal populations in northwestern Europe were not heavily affected by inbreeding, challenging l...

item.title: Biographical Overview and Portraits of French Actress Suzy Vernon from the Silent Film Era
item.description: Suzy Vernon, born Amelie Paris on June 26, 1901, and passing away on January 24, 1997, was a prominent French film actress known for her work as a leading lady in French and German cinema during the s...

item.title: Montreal shooting prompts renewed calls to ban SKS rifle amid gun control debate
item.description: A recent shooting in Montreal has reignited debate over firearms regulation in Canada, with advocacy groups once again urging the federal government to prohibit the sale of SKS rifles. The incident, w...

item.title: Opinion piece warns of political and moral decline in the United States during America 250 celebrations
item.description: The article is an opinion column reflecting on the state of the United States during celebrations tied to its 250th anniversary. The author argues that the country is experiencing a profound moral and...

item.title: Report: Pope Leo XIV to issue updated guidance on just war amid tensions with President Trump
item.description: Pope Leo XIV is expected to release new guidance on the Catholic Church’s teaching regarding what constitutes a “just war,” following a high-level meeting with cardinals from around the world. Accordi...

item.title: Report claims concerns about President Trump’s health and ability to complete his term amid staff and political speculation
item.description: A report highlighted by columnist Brian Karem and published in Salon claims that concerns are circulating among some members of President Donald Trump’s staff and political circles regarding his physi...

item.title: Legal Analyst Reacts to Katie Miller's Social Media Post Referencing Springfield Pet Conspiracy After Supreme Court Ruling
item.description: On a Morning Joe segment discussing a Supreme Court ruling, legal analyst Lisa Rubin expressed strong shock over a social media post by Katie Miller, wife of Trump adviser Stephen Miller. The post cel...

item.title: U.S. trade deficit widens in June despite tariff policy, Commerce Department reports
item.description: A new Commerce Department report shows that the U.S. goods trade deficit expanded significantly in June, challenging one of former President Donald Trump’s long-standing economic promises to reduce it...

item.title: Former CBS News Executive Producer Bill Owens Plans Memoir Criticizing Network Leadership and Corporate Decisions
item.description: Former CBS News executive producer Bill Owens, who spent 37 years at the network before resigning from '60 Minutes' in April, is preparing a memoir that sharply criticizes CBS and its leadership. Acco...

item.title: Analysts Criticize Fox News for Minimizing Coverage of Low Turnout at Trump's State Fair Event
item.description: President Donald Trump's Great American State Fair kickoff event on the National Mall in Washington, D.C., on June 25, 2026, drew significant attention due to its reportedly low attendance. While Trum...

item.title: New book claims Trump was angered by publication of descriptions of his private bathroom and bedroom preferences
item.description: A newly published book, 'Regime Change,' by New York Times reporters Maggie Haberman and Jonathan Swan, has reportedly caused significant concern within the White House by revealing details about Pres...

item.title: Amazon Prime Day 2026 Ends With Major Discounts Across Tech, Home, Beauty, and Travel Products
item.description: NBC Select highlights the final day of Amazon Prime Day 2026, emphasizing that shoppers have less than 24 hours to take advantage of significant discounts before the event concludes. The article, whic...

item.title: Power outage disrupts opening day of Trump's Great American State Fair on the National Mall
item.description: The opening day of President Donald Trump's 16-day Great American State Fair in Washington, D.C., experienced operational problems after a power outage affected the food hall on the National Mall. Acc...
